footer.tagline: A crypto site for everyday people, in plain words
footer.about: CryptoPulse.media is an independent crypto media project for everyday investors and anyone who wants to understand the crypto market in plain language. The site brings together up-to-date cryptocurrency news and original analysis — in both Russian and English.
footer.disclaimerText: This site is for informational purposes only. Not financial advice.
footer.subscribeTitle: The crypto essentials — once a week in your inbox
footer.disclosureText: Some pages and the sidebar may show partner banners — always marked "Ad". They don't affect the editorial independence of our news and articles.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: This page doesn't seem to exist — it may have been removed, or the address might be incorrect.
